Kestrel Mesh

Dynamic node distribution and signal relay infrastructure. Tactical mesh networking for high-mobility environments.

Sentinel Ring

NexaMesh delivers high-precision signal intelligence using a decentralized mesh infrastructure. Designed for modern electronic warfare and tactical surveillance operations in denied environments.
